zh.lifeSummary: 當King Alexander I King Of Scotland The Fierce Caenmore於1077年出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾培斯時，他的父親Malcolm III King of Scotland46歲，母親St Margaret of Wessex, Queen of Scotland32歲。他於1106年與Sibylla Fitzhenry在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特奧陳布雷可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1124年4月23日在蘇格蘭斯林史爾斯特林享年47歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当King Alexander I King Of Scotland The Fierce Caenmore于1077年出生在英国苏格兰培爾培斯时，他的父亲Malcolm III King of Scotland46岁，母亲St Margaret of Wessex, Queen of Scotland32岁。他于1106年与Sibylla Fitzhenry在英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特奧陳布雷可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1124年4月23日在苏格兰斯林史爾斯特林享年47岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰費伏登福姆林。

nameMeanings.name: King
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the vocabulary word for a male monarch, bestowed, especially in America, with a hint of the notion that the bearer would have kingly qualities;  compare  Duke   and   Earl .  In some cases it may be a transferred use of the surname (originally a nickname or an occupational name given to someone who was employed in a royal household). Its frequency among African Americans is no doubt partly attributable to the civil rights leader  Martin Luther King  (  1929–68 ). It is also used as a short form of   Kingsley .

variants.name: Kingsley
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, originally a local name derived from various places (in Cheshire, Hampshire, Staffordshire) named in Old English as Cyningeslēah ‘king's wood’.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

nameMeanings.name: King
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the vocabulary word for a male monarch, bestowed, especially in America, with a hint of the notion that the bearer would have kingly qualities;  compare  Duke   and   Earl .  In some cases it may be a transferred use of the surname (originally a nickname or an occupational name given to someone who was employed in a royal household). Its frequency among African Americans is no doubt partly attributable to the civil rights leader  Martin Luther King  (  1929–68 ). It is also used as a short form of   Kingsley .

variants.name: Kingsley
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, originally a local name derived from various places (in Cheshire, Hampshire, Staffordshire) named in Old English as Cyningeslēah ‘king's wood’.

nameMeanings.name: Of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Scotland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Scotland, Scolland. Found in Normandy as well as England, it evidently denoted a Scot or someone with an association with Scotland.
ethnic name for someone from Scotland, from Middle English Scotlond ‘Scotland’. Compare England .

variants.name: England
meanings: English: habitational name from Middle English Engelond ‘England’. It was probably a formal alternative to English , which is also well evidenced as a surname in England. These names may have been acquired by English landowners who moved in Norman social circles or who lived in a neighbouring country (Scotland, Wales, or Ireland), or by English merchants who traded abroad.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of various farmsteads so named, from Old Norse eng ‘meadow’ + land ‘land’.
Swedish: ornamental name with the same meaning as 2.

nameMeanings.name: The
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Dorothea  , also used independently.

nameMeanings.name: Fierce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Piers  , borne for example by the Irish-born film actor  Pierce Brosnan  (  b. 1953 ). In many cases it may represent a transferred use of the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Pearce
meanings: Transferred use of the English surname ; popular among Irish nationalists since the rising of  1916 , led by the writer and educationist Patrick Henry Pearce, who was executed by the British.

en.lifeSummary: When King Alexander I King Of Scotland The Fierce Caenmore was born in 1077, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Malcolm III King of Scotland, was 46 and his mother, St Margaret of Wessex, Queen of Scotland, was 32. He married Sibylla Fitzhenry in 1106, in Auchenbreck, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 23 April 1124, in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, at the age of 47, and was buried in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque King Alexander I King Of Scotland The Fierce Caenmore est né en 1077, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Malcolm III King of Scotland, avait 46 ans et sa mère, St Margaret of Wessex, Queen of Scotland, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Sibylla Fitzhenry en 1106, à Auchenbreck, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 23 avril 1124, à Stirling, Stirlingshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1106 in Auchenbreck, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom Sibylla Fitzhenry geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 23. Lui sposato Sibylla Fitzhenry nel 1106, nel Auchenbreck, Argyll and Bute, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. ja.lifeSummary: King Alexander I King Of Scotland The Fierce Caenmoreが1077年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスで生まれた時，父Malcolm III King of Scotlandは46歳，母St Margaret of Wessex, Queen of Scotlandは32歳であった。1106年にイギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトアウチェンブレックでSibylla Fitzhenryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1124年4月23日にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアスティルリングで47歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインにて埋葬された。

ko.Auchenbreck, Argyll and Bute, United Kin: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 오천브레크
ko.lifeSummary: King Alexander I King Of Scotland The Fierce Caenmore(이)가 1077년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Malcolm III King of Scotland(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 St Margaret of Wessex, Queen of Scotland(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1106년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 오천브레크에서 Sibylla Fitzhenry(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1124년 4월 23일 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 스티를링에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando King Alexander I King Of Scotland The Fierce Caenmore nasceu em 1077, em Perth, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Malcolm III King of Scotland, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, St Margaret of Wessex, Queen of Scotland, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Sibylla Fitzhenry em 1106, em Auchenbreck, Argyll and Bute, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 23 de abril de 1124, em Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Dunfermline, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Auchenbreck, Argyll and Bute, United Kin: аучэнбрекк, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда King Alexander I King Of Scotland The Fierce Caenmore родился в 1077 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Malcolm III King of Scotland было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали St Margaret of Wessex, Queen of Scotland, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Sibylla Fitzhenry в 1106 г. в местности аучэнбрекк, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 23 апреля 1124 г. в местности стирлинг, стирлингшир, Шотландия в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Sibylla Fitzhenry en 1106, en Auchenbreck, Argyll and Bute, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 23 de abril de 1124, en Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Dunfermline, Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido.
